en: Now Elijah the Tishbite, of Tishbe in Gilead, said to Ahab, "As the LORD the God of Israel lives, before whom I stand, there shall be neither dew nor rain these years, except by my word."
zh: 提斯比人以利亞，就是從基列的提斯比來的 ，對亞哈說：“我指著我所事奉永活的耶和華以色列的 神起誓，這幾年若是沒有我的命令，天必不降露，也不下雨。”

en: And the word of the LORD came to him,
zh: 耶和華的話臨到以利亞說：

en: "Depart from here and turn eastward and hide yourself by the brook Cherith, which is east of the Jordan.
zh: “你離開這裡，向東方去，躲藏在約旦河東面的基立溪旁。

en: You shall drink from the brook, and I have commanded the ravens to feed you there."
zh: 你要喝那溪裡的水，我已經吩咐烏鴉在那裡供養你。”

en: So he went and did according to the word of the LORD. He went and lived by the brook Cherith that is east of the Jordan.
zh: 於是以利亞去了，照著耶和華的話行了；他去住在約旦河東面的基立溪旁。

en: And the ravens brought him bread and meat in the morning, and bread and meat in the evening, and he drank from the brook.
zh: 烏鴉早晨給他送餅和肉來，晚上也送餅和肉來，他也喝那溪裡的水。

en: And after a while the brook dried up, because there was no rain in the land.
zh: 過了一些日子，那溪就乾了，因為沒有雨下在地上。

en: Then the word of the LORD came to him,
zh: 耶和華的話又臨到以利亞說：

en: "Arise, go to Zarephath, which belongs to Sidon, and dwell there. Behold, I have commanded a widow there to feed you."
zh: “你起來，往西頓的撒勒法去，住在那裡；我已經吩咐那裡的一個寡婦供養你。”

en: So he arose and went to Zarephath. And when he came to the gate of the city, behold, a widow was there gathering sticks. And he called to her and said, "Bring me a little water in a vessel, that I may drink."
zh: 於是以利亞起來，往撒勒法去了；他來到城門口的時候，就看見一個寡婦在那裡撿柴；以利亞呼叫她，說：“請你用器皿取點水來給我！”

en: And as she was going to bring it, he called to her and said, "Bring me a morsel of bread in your hand."
zh: 她去取水的時候，以利亞又叫她，說：“請你也給我拿點餅來！”

en: And she said, "As the LORD your God lives, I have nothing baked, only a handful of flour in a jar and a little oil in a jug. And now I am gathering a couple of sticks that I may go in and prepare it for myself and my son, that we may eat it and die."
zh: 她說：“我指著永活的耶和華你的 神起誓，我沒有餅，缸裡只有一把麵粉，瓶裡只有一點油。你看我正在撿兩根柴，然後回去，為自己和兒子做餅，我們吃完了，就等死。”

en: And Elijah said to her, "Do not fear; go and do as you have said. But first make me a little cake of it and bring it to me, and afterward make something for yourself and your son.
zh: 以利亞對她說：“不要懼怕，照著你所說的去作吧，不過要先為我做一個小餅，拿出來給我，然後才為你自己和兒子做餅。

en: For thus says the LORD the God of Israel, 'The jar of flour shall not be spent, and the jug of oil shall not be empty, until the day that the LORD sends rain upon the earth.'"
zh: 因為耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：‘缸裡的麵粉必不會用完，瓶裡的油決不會短缺，直等到耶和華降雨在地面上的日子。’”

en: And she went and did as Elijah said. And she and he and her household ate for many days.
zh: 她就去照著以利亞所說的作了。她和以利亞，以及她的家人，吃了許多日子。

en: The jar of flour was not spent, neither did the jug of oil become empty, according to the word of the LORD that he spoke by Elijah.
zh: 缸裡的麵粉果然沒有用完，瓶裡的油也沒有短缺，正像耶和華藉著以利亞所說的話一樣。

en: After this the son of the woman, the mistress of the house, became ill. And his illness was so severe that there was no breath left in him.
zh: 這些事以後，那婦人，就是那個家庭的女主人的兒子病了。他的病情十分嚴重，以致呼吸都停止了。

en: And she said to Elijah, "What have you against me, O man of God? You have come to me to bring my sin to remembrance and to cause the death of my son!"
zh: 於是婦人對以利亞說：“神人哪，我跟你有甚麼關係呢？你竟到我這裡來，使耶和華想起我的罪孽，殺死我的兒子。”

en: And he said to her, "Give me your son." And he took him from her arms and carried him up into the upper chamber where he lodged, and laid him on his own bed.
zh: 以利亞對她說：“把你的兒子交給我吧！”以利亞就從她的懷中把孩子接過來，抱他上到自己所住的樓上去，放在自己的床上。

en: And he cried to the LORD, "O LORD my God, have you brought calamity even upon the widow with whom I sojourn, by killing her son?"
zh: 以利亞呼求耶和華說：“耶和華我的 神啊，我寄居在這寡婦的家裡，你也降禍與她，使她的兒子死去嗎？”

en: Then he stretched himself upon the child three times and cried to the LORD, "O LORD my God, let this child's life come into him again."
zh: 然後，以利亞三次伏在孩子的身上，向耶和華呼求說：“耶和華我的 神，求你恢復這孩子的生命吧。”

en: And the LORD listened to the voice of Elijah. And the life of the child came into him again, and he revived.
zh: 耶和華垂聽了以利亞的話，孩子的生命果然恢復，活過來了。

en: And Elijah took the child and brought him down from the upper chamber into the house and delivered him to his mother. And Elijah said, "See, your son lives."
zh: 以利亞把孩子抱起來，從樓上下到屋子裡去，把孩子交給他的母親；以利亞說：“看，你的兒子活了！”

en: And the woman said to Elijah, "Now I know that you are a man of God, and that the word of the LORD in your mouth is truth."
zh: 婦人對以利亞說：“現在我知道你是神人，耶和華藉著你的口所說的話是真實的。”
